ApprovalRequestForm.text_270: Seorang Member mengajukan permohonan untuk menonaktifkan perlindungan.
ApprovalRequestForm.text_271: Gamblock AI - Quick Approval via WhatsApp

approvalFlow.title: Protection change request
approvalFlow.body: A protected user is asking their accountability partner for a decision.
approvalFlow.footer: This decision is limited to this request and recorded securely.
approvalFlow.approvedBody: The user can apply the approved change from the associated device.
approvalFlow.deniedBody: The request is closed and protection remains active.

errors.invalid_token: The approval link is invalid or has expired.
errors.resolve_failed: The decision could not be saved. Please try again.
errors.unavailable: The approval link cannot be used.

[id]Page.text_286: in depth. You’ll learn the basic concepts, the underlying psychological mechanisms, and practical techniques you can apply immediately in daily life to maintain self-regulation stability.
[id]Page.text_287: 1. Basic Concepts & The Importance of Self-Regulation
[id]Page.text_289: , failure to resist gambling urges is often caused by reduced cognitive-control capacity at critical moments (e.g. when tired, anxious, or under financial pressure). Understanding these vulnerable situations is a crucial first step.
[id]Page.text_292: Note the emotions you feel before the urge to access a gambling site appears (stress, boredom, or loneliness?).
[id]Page.text_294: When the urge appears, take a deep 10-second breath. Focus your mind on the long-term consequences.
[id]Page.text_296: Don’t hesitate to send a short message to your registered partner to ask for moral support.
[id]Page.text_297: Building solid self-control takes time and consistent practice. Every successful resistance to an impulsive urge, however small, is a step toward full recovery.
[id]Page.text_299: Finish reading the material above to record your progress.

[token]Page.text_305: Anda sekarang resmi terdaftar sebagai **Pendamping Akuntabilitas**. Anda akan menerima notifikasi jika pengguna terproteksi meminta izin penonaktifan atau pause proteksi.
[token]Page.text_309: Anda diundang untuk menjadi pendamping akuntabilitas pemulihan judi online. Tugas Anda adalah membantu memantau dan memberikan persetujuan saat diperlukan.

accountabilityWorkspace.title: Recovery is stronger together
accountabilityWorkspace.description: Connect with a trusted partner who can approve protection changes and support your recovery commitment.
accountabilityWorkspace.privacyBody: Partners cannot see your URLs, domains, browsing history, mood, intention, or private journal.
accountabilityWorkspace.errorBody: Check your connection and try again.
accountabilityWorkspace.partnerDescription: Invite a trusted person to become your accountability partner for protection change approvals.
accountabilityWorkspace.partnerEmailHelp: Enter the email of your trusted partner (e.g. family, close friend, or counselor).
accountabilityWorkspace.activePartnerHelp: Your partner is connected and will receive approval requests when you need to change protection settings.
accountabilityWorkspace.invitedPartnerHelp: The invitation is ready. Share the consent link securely so your partner can accept it.
accountabilityWorkspace.inviteSuccess: The invitation for {email} is ready. Share its consent link securely.
accountabilityWorkspace.inviteError: The partner invitation could not be created.
accountabilityWorkspace.revokeDialogBody: You will need to invite a new partner to restore approval-based protection changes.
accountabilityWorkspace.revokeError: The accountability relationship could not be disconnected.
accountabilityWorkspace.approvalTitle: Protection changes start on the device
accountabilityWorkspace.approvalDescription: Pause, disable, and removal requests must be created from the Android or Windows app so they are bound to the protected device.
accountabilityWorkspace.approvalActiveBody: Your partner is connected. Open Gamblock AI on the device you want to change to create a secure request.
accountabilityWorkspace.approvalInactiveBody: Connect a partner, then open Gamblock AI on the protected device.
accountabilityWorkspace.approvalDialogBody: Under the social accountability protocol, changing protection settings requires your partner's approval. Provide your reason below.
accountabilityWorkspace.approvalReasonPlaceholder: Why do you want to change protection settings? Write an honest reason for your partner...
accountabilityWorkspace.approvalReasonAudience: This reason will be shared with your partner for their review.
accountabilityWorkspace.pendingBody: A request is waiting for your partner's decision. You will be notified when they respond.
accountabilityWorkspace.cancelDialogBody: You can submit a new request later if needed.
accountabilityWorkspace.requestCancelError: The request could not be cancelled.
accountabilityWorkspace.partnerInboxBody: Review the reason and deadline before deciding. You do not receive browsing data or private recovery notes.
accountabilityWorkspace.approveDialogBody: The requested protection change may be applied after this decision is saved.
accountabilityWorkspace.denyDialogBody: The request will close as denied. The user can submit another request if needed.
accountabilityWorkspace.requestDecisionError: The decision could not be saved.
accountabilityWorkspace.historyDescription: Previous approval requests and their outcomes.
accountabilityWorkspace.historyEmptyBody: Approval requests you submit will appear here.

partnerWorkspace.title: Support that protects student privacy
partnerWorkspace.description: This workspace only provides safe support paths. Synthetic metrics and example organizations are not shown as if they were real data.
partnerWorkspace.privacyBody: Partners cannot see a student's URLs, domains, browsing history, mood, intention, or private journal.
partnerWorkspace.relationshipBody: View invitation and relationship status created with both parties' consent.
partnerWorkspace.approvalBody: Review active requests from the accountability page. Decisions can only be made by the partner on an active relationship.
partnerWorkspace.supportBody: Use the help center to understand the partner role and provide support without excessive monitoring.
partnerWorkspace.liveStatus: Requests are persisted and limited to active relationships

accountabilityV2.studentDescription: Manage approvals, aggregate sharing boundaries, and how you leave a support relationship.
accountabilityV2.partnerDescription: Review student requests without access to browsing data or private recovery notes.
accountabilityV2.privacyBody: Partners only see aggregate categories enabled by the student. URLs, domains, browsing history, mood, intentions, and journals are never shared.
accountabilityV2.errorTitle: The accountability space could not be loaded
accountabilityV2.errorBody: Check your session and connection, then try again.
accountabilityV2.decisionQueueBody: A decision only applies to one request and requires a recent sign-in session.
accountabilityV2.supportiveResponsePlaceholder: Share the decision in calm language and suggest a safe next step...
accountabilityV2.approveDialogBody: This decision only applies to this request. The protection change can be applied after approval is saved.
accountabilityV2.denyDialogBody: The request will close as denied. The student can submit a new request if it is still needed.
accountabilityV2.noDecisionsBody: Requests from a student's device will appear here.
accountabilityV2.leaveQueueBody: Normal requests can be reviewed. An unsafe exit stops sharing immediately.
accountabilityV2.keepMembershipDialogBody: The exit request will be denied and the support relationship will return to active.
accountabilityV2.endMembershipDialogBody: The membership will end and all access to the student's summaries will stop.
accountabilityV2.unsafePartnerNotice: The student has stopped all sharing. Do not reactivate the relationship without a safe support review.
accountabilityV2.noGroupBody: Enter a group code on the Partners page to start a consent-based relationship.
accountabilityV2.sharingBody: Review your choices first, then save all changes together. Private content is never shared.

protection_health.title: Protection readiness
protection_health.body: Ready or needs-attention status and active device count.

protection_activity.title: Protection activity
protection_activity.body: Weekly block count and heartbeat time bucket, without URLs.

recovery_engagement.title: Recovery engagement
recovery_engagement.body: Check-in days and completed missions, without mood or note content.

education_progress.title: Education progress
education_progress.body: Broad completion stage, without learning responses.

accountabilityV2.approvalStatusBody: Pause or removal requests are created on the protected device.
accountabilityV2.cancelApprovalDialogBody: Your partner cannot decide this request after it is cancelled. You can create a new request from the device later.
accountabilityV2.nativeRequestBody: Use the Android or Windows app to request a protection change.
accountabilityV2.leaveBody: Choose the normal flow or stop sharing immediately if the relationship feels unsafe.
accountabilityV2.normalLeaveDialogBody: Your partner has up to 72 hours to review it. While waiting, enabled aggregate categories remain shared and can still be changed.
accountabilityV2.cancelLeaveDialogBody: The support relationship will return to active and your partner can no longer decide this request.
accountabilityV2.pendingLeaveSharingNotice: The support relationship remains active during review. You can still change the aggregate categories you share.
accountabilityV2.unsafeHelp: The unsafe option immediately disables all sharing and sends the case for support review.
accountabilityV2.unsafeLeaveDialogBody: All aggregate categories and pending protection requests will stop immediately. There is no direct undo, and recovery goes through the support team.
accountabilityV2.safetyReviewTitle: The relationship is under safe review
accountabilityV2.safetyReviewBody: No aggregate data is being shared. Contact the Gamblock-AI Team if you need help or want to safely rebuild the relationship.
accountabilityV2.requestHistoryBody: Review requests from your device and the outcome of each decision.
accountabilityV2.historyEmptyBody: Pause or removal requests from your device will appear here.

partnersV2.studentDescription: Build a partner relationship that is clear, private, and under your control.
partnersV2.partnerDescription: Create groups, share rotating codes safely, and view only summaries approved by each student.
partnersV2.privacyBody: Partners never receive URLs, domains, browsing history, mood, intentions, journals, or other private details beyond the aggregate data selected by the student.
partnersV2.errorTitle: Support relationship data could not be loaded
partnersV2.errorBody: Check your session and connection, then try again.
partnersV2.joinBody: The code only finds the group. You will see the partner identity before you confirm.
partnersV2.confirmBody: Joining initially enables four aggregate categories that you can disable at any time.
partnersV2.previewEmptyBody: Enter a code to see the group and partner name before joining.
partnersV2.setupStepsBody: Each step keeps consent and data boundaries visible.

preview.title: Review the identity
preview.body: Confirm the group and partner name before continuing.

consent.title: Confirm knowingly
consent.body: Joining is an active decision and does not expose your private notes.

control.title: Stay in control
control.body: Manage shared aggregate categories or stop sharing if the relationship becomes unsafe.

partnersV2.currentGroupBody: Identity, status, and important actions in one relationship summary.
partnersV2.boundaryDetailsBody: Accountability supports protection decisions without becoming surveillance of personal activity.

boundaryItems.approval: Protection pause or removal requests that you submit.
boundaryItems.aggregate: Aggregate summaries from categories that you explicitly enable.
boundaryItems.private: No URLs, history, mood, intentions, journals, or private reflections.
boundaryItems.control: Sharing boundaries can be reviewed or stopped from the Accountability page.

partnersV2.quickActionsBody: Use the dedicated workspace to manage data or request support.
partnersV2.manageAccountabilityBody: Review sharing boundaries, protection requests, or exit status.
partnersV2.openPartnerSupportBody: Send and track contact requests from the Support Center.
partnersV2.verificationBody: Email and WhatsApp must be verified before you can create a group.
partnersV2.partnerOverviewBody: See responsibilities that need attention before managing groups.
partnersV2.openDecisionQueueBody: Review protection and exit requests on the Accountability page.
partnersV2.openContactQueueBody: Respond to students through the Partner channel in the Support Center.
partnersV2.createGroupBody: Each group has a rotating code and can support multiple consenting students.
partnersV2.groupDescriptionPlaceholder: Explain the purpose and boundaries of this group...
partnersV2.createRequiresVerification: Complete email and WhatsApp verification to enable group creation.
partnersV2.groupCreated: Group created. Store or share the code safely.
partnersV2.groupsBody: Member summaries follow each student's sharing choices.
partnersV2.noGroupsBody: After verification, create your first group from this panel.
partnersV2.rotateCode: Rotate and reveal a new code
partnersV2.codeRotated: The old code was disabled and a new code was created.
partnersV2.memberRemoved: The member was removed and sharing stopped.
partnersV2.archiveGroup: Archive group with no active members
